titleStmt.title: SII 11.86: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 86. (B.K. No. 48 of 1927-28). KORLAHAḶḶI, MUNDARGI PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING ON THE RUINED DAM ACROSS THE RIVER TUṄGABHADRĀ.

summary.p: This damaged inscription in Kannaḍa refers itself to the reign of Traiḷōkyamalladēva (Sōmēśvara I). It registers a gift of land to a god (name lost) by Akkādēvī who was ruling over Kisukāḍu Seventy, Bāgaḍage Seventy, Toṟagale • • •, Māsiyavāḍi One Hundred and Forty and other districts, from Pannāvaḻeya-kōṭe. The gift was made in the presence of her subordinate Mahāsāmanta Ajjarasa, who bears the birudas: Dvārāvatīpuravarēśvara, • • • Garuḍadhvaja and others. He is evidently a Yādava chief and is described as having defeated the Chōḷa, [Ān]dhra, Magadha, Koṅkaṇa, Māḷava, Pāñchāla and Lāḻa kings. This chief is not known hitherto. Akkādēvī is evidently the paternal aunt of king Sōmēśvara.

The record is dated Śaka 97[2], • • • •, [Mār]gaśira, śu. pañchamī, vyatīpāta, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti. The details are inadequate for verifying the date. In Śaka 972, corresponding to Vikṛita, the Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti fell on Pushya, śu. 8, Monday = A.D. 1050, December 24.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© sasti samastabhuvanāsreya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabeṭṭārakaṁ satyāsraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara vija
yerājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamāna mācandrārkkatāraṁba
luttire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti Arinripamakuṭaghaṭṭita
ravinde gaṅgāsnānapavitreyu dīnānātaciṁntāmaṇigaḷu
cūḍāmaṇiga ḷēkavākyeyaru guṇadabeḍaṁgiyarappa śrīmada
viyar kisukāḍeḻpattumaṁ bāgaḍage yeḻpattumaṁ toṟagale
maṁ māseyavāḍi nūṟanālvattumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭaprati
diṁ sukasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttaṁ pannāvaḻeya kōṭeya daṇḍina
cōḷāṁdhramagadha koṁkaṇa māḷava pāñcāḷalāḷaraṁ bhujabaḷadiṁ ka
koṇḍāḷdanu yaduśauryyaṁ caḷukyakuḷatiḷakaṁ yarasumenisi dakkādē
rā divyaśrīpādapadmōpajīvi . svastisamadhigatapa
hāsabda mahāsāmantaṁ vīralakṣmīkāntaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarēsva
garuḍadhvajaṁ saṁkacakralāṁcanaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ na
Aribhūpāḻara nājiyoḷu taridu kolvēkāṅga vīraṁ saraṁ
paracakravakranenipaṁ pratyakṣagōvindanāsurakōpaṁ bha
yatabhujaṁ vidviṣṭamārtta(ṁ)ṇḍa nurbbiyoḷu śrīraṇamu
dāyādyakāḷānaḷaṁ . parabaḷa bhīmaṁ yācakasa The letter ḷa is inserted in a small siśe between ba and bhi.
marāmanene sale negaḻdajjarasaṁ cāḷukyakuḷēsvariya sami
sukhadinda . raṇamūrkkapārttarūpaṁ guṇakaṟaṁ goṇḍa
raṇāgraṇi yenipaṟimarddana vīradaṇadiṁ sanmānā
Antu manni kūrttajjarabhūpaṁ koḍeya
gaḷaṁ paḍedu negaḻdeṟimarddaṁ prithuvige paḍe caṁdramā
Arasiyarātana nakkaṟiṁ barisi sukhāsanadalirisi dē
mahimāspada ḷaverasu kuḍalu paḍedu niḻdaneḷegeṟe
nenasida liḷeya jayasiṅghanripana pesaraṁ kūrttiddā
tipāḷisi kuḍe negaḻda gaṇḍajēṁkāṟanivaṁ . kaliyille
samunisigilla cāturyya mantā kaliyuṁ cāturyya
rācakradoḷbāgiyille kaliyuṁ cāturyyanuṁ cāgayu
lāyamaṁ meygaliyuṁ cāturyyanuṁ cāgiyume
© svasti saka nripakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṅgaḷu 972
rggasira suddha pañcame dvitīpāta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrā
viyar manne yajjarasanaṁ tanna sannidhānakke barisi
rāpūrvvakadiṁ kālgarcci biṭṭa keyi da mattaru 1
mattaru 12 haṟikāṟargge Eremattaru 6 kisuma
sūḷe yargge Eremattaru 15 kisumattar 9
grāsakkaṁ Eremattar 12 keṟege biṭṭa keyi E
®di mattar 1 dēvargge nivēdyakke gaḻdekamma 775 tapōdhana
kamma 450 dharmmabrayada pō
bāskaraṁ nairiti koḻduva kōḍa bāviyakotta
dēvara gaḻde kētana mūḍaṇadese . dharmmabrayada
dēvargge Erkkayya manegaḷ 13 gāṇa 1 . hannusigaṁ padmanābha
ttar 12 gaḻde kamma 450 tōṁṭakamma 370 Arvaṇa gadyāṇa 3
kṣētradalu sāsirvva rbrāhmaṇaramaṁ sāsirvva tapōdhanara
ṇaru manaḷida brahmātikāṟanu makku I dharmmamaṁ
sahasraliṅgava pratiṣṭegeyda phaḷamakku maṅgaḷa sā
kāḷē kāḷē pāḻanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvēṣāṁ bhāgina prārttivēndrā
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁddharā ṣa(r)ṣṭivarṣasa
svasti śrīmatu nālku yugada poḷalu kōgaḷiya citrakā
Antu mūvattu mattaroḷage bammaṁjage vasigegeyi ma
kammāṟarige mānyada
ge tiṟuvaru
Digital edition of SII 11.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
